decision-tree.root-question: Does the query distribution include multi-hop questions (>20%)?

branch.conclusion: Adopt agentic RAG with the full grader + groundedness loop.
Skip — latency budget too tight for agentic. Improve single-hop retrieval instead.
Skip — vanilla RAG with a relevance grader is enough.

example.p: Adopt agentic RAG with the full grader + groundedness loop.
